seoTitle: How to Create a Sign-Up Form in Brevo
metaDescription: Build a compliant lead-capture form in Brevo with the drag-and-drop builder, double opt-in confirmation, and a responsive embed snippet for your site.
intro: Growing a subscriber list or collecting customer data doesn't require writing custom HTML from scratch. Brevo's drag-and-drop form builder handles the design and compliance details, including double opt-in confirmation, so you can embed a working sign-up form on your website quickly.

steps.heading: Create a new form container
steps.body: From the main dashboard navigation, create and name a new internal subscription form to start building.

steps.heading: Design the visual elements
steps.body: Use the left-side sidebar to add and personalize fields, font themes, and layout elements for the form.

steps.heading: Map custom profile attributes
steps.body: Connect each form field to the corresponding custom attribute in your contacts database so submissions populate the correct data.

steps.heading: Set up double opt-in
steps.body: Enable the dual confirmation loop so new subscribers must confirm their email before being fully added to your list.

steps.heading: Grab the embed snippet
steps.body: Copy the responsive iframe embed code and add it to your website where you want the form to appear.

faq.question: What is double opt-in and why does it matter?
faq.answer: Double opt-in requires new subscribers to confirm their email before being added to your list, which improves list quality and compliance.

faq.question: Can I embed the form on any website?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo provides a responsive iframe embed snippet that works on most standard website builders and custom sites.

faq.question: Do I need to know HTML to build the form?
faq.answer: No, the drag-and-drop builder handles the design without requiring you to write custom HTML.

faq.question: Will form submissions automatically sync to my contact list?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as your fields are properly mapped to your contacts database attributes, submissions sync automatically.
